settings.title: RELAX RECOVER SLEEP BALANCE
settings.description: Iron Fuel Lab Is A US-Made Dietary Supplement Brand Focused On Advanced Formula Vitamins & Minerals

settings.title: DRIVE CLARITY FOCUS
settings.description: The mental clarity is unmatched. No jitters, just clean, sharp focus that lasts throughout the entire day.

settings.title: Pharmaceutical Grade
settings.content: Our supplements are produced in FDA-registered facilities following strict cGMP protocols to ensure purity and potency.

settings.title: Third-Party Tested
settings.content: Every batch undergoes rigorous independent lab testing for heavy metals, contaminants, and ingredient verification.

settings.title: Bioavailable Forms
settings.content: We use the most bioavailable forms of every ingredient, ensuring your body actually absorbs what you ingest.

settings.question: When will I see results?
settings.answer: Most users report increased focus and energy within 30 minutes, with long-term hormonal balance improving over 2-4 weeks of consistent use.

settings.question: Are your products vegan?
settings.answer: Yes, our entire ZenFuel and NeuroFuel lines are 100% vegan-friendly and gluten-free.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: We currently ship to over 50 countries worldwide. Shipping times vary by location but usually take 5-10 business days.
